name: display-scripts
title: Display Scripts
description: Toggle between side-by-side and stacked MacBook + external monitor layouts in one keystroke.
author: Thomas

commands.name: toggle-arrangement
commands.title: Toggle Arrangement
commands.subtitle: Display Scripts
commands.description: Switch between side-by-side and stacked MacBook + external monitor layouts.

preferences.name: externalDisplayId
preferences.title: External Display ID
preferences.description: Persistent screen ID of your external monitor. Get it by running `displayplacer list` in Terminal.

preferences.name: macbookDisplayId
preferences.title: MacBook Display ID
preferences.description: Persistent screen ID of your MacBook's built-in display.

preferences.name: macbookOriginSideBySide
preferences.title: MacBook Origin (Side-by-Side)
preferences.description: MacBook's origin coordinate in the side-by-side layout (laptop pushed to the side with external keyboard in front).

preferences.name: macbookOriginUpAndDown
preferences.title: MacBook Origin (Up-and-Down)
preferences.description: MacBook's origin coordinate in the stacked layout (laptop pulled in front of you on a stand for meetings).

preferences.name: displayplacerPath
preferences.title: Path to displayplacer
preferences.description: Absolute path to the `displayplacer` binary. Install with `brew install displayplacer`.
